newsSince: No material new company-specific news since June 9. Q2 FY26 guidance (~$240M revenue, record, ~49.5% non-GAAP GM, ~$0.61 EPS) and the 2030 plan ($1.6B rev / 55% GM / $5.00 EPS, HBM4 + CPO + Texas capacity) were disclosed with Q1 results / Investor Day in late April and were already in the prior case. The +19% move since June 9 is re-rating/momentum, not a new catalyst.

verdicts.rankRationale: No new node/HBM evidence since June 9; the AI-node alpha case is intact but the 'smaller market visibility' premise keeps eroding as coverage (e.g. Evercore) discovers FORM after a +143% YTD. Probe-card/HBM thesis unchanged, so mild drift down on residual-alpha grounds, not a thesis hit.
verdicts.bull: Record HBM/DRAM probe-card demand plus foundry/logic networking probe ramp.
verdicts.neutral: Strong execution but increasingly well-discovered AI-node name.
verdicts.bear: Probe-card cycle and crowding leave little hidden alpha after the run.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: HBM4 share gains / GPU probe demand

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens: management's prior framing of CPO as the 'engine' to double the systems segment by 2030 remains the live thesis, and no new evidence either way since June 9. Small positive drift for an intact, page-specific CPO/known-good-die case; no rank move after the recent surge.
verdicts.bull: Wafer-level test/KGD leverage into HBM, chiplets and photonics; CPO a named growth engine.
verdicts.neutral: CPO opportunity sized but multi-year; thesis unchanged this period.
verdicts.bear: Photonics/CPO ramp timing uncertain; probe cycle risk.

verdicts.rankRationale: Prior case already moved FORM down for the +143% rerating with no hidden alpha left; nothing new since June 9 justifies a second move. The +19% rally is momentum, not a thesis event, so hold on the master list.
verdicts.bull: Upstream test/probe-card pick-and-shovel with record revenue trajectory.
verdicts.neutral: Quality compounder, but valuation has run hard.
verdicts.bear: Heavy YTD rerating exhausts residual bottleneck asymmetry.
